items.title: hololive production x Smilegate: La+ Darknesss Tokyo Game Show 2025 Appearance
items.author: maki
items.content:
September 26, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that La+ Darknesss will appear at Tokyo Game Show 2025 (TGS 2025), joining on Smilegate’s main stage with a special talk show, celebrating the recent hololive production x Smilegate collaboration where she sang a song titled “Jumping in the TIME” in the first official OST for its upcoming collectible RPG “MIRESI: Invisible Future,” developed by Control 9 (Co-CEOs Soon-gu Cho and Se-woong Kwon). The special program will happen on September 28, 05:00 UTC at Smilegate’s booth (Makuhari Messe, Hall 4, n08).

In the talk show, La+ Darknesss will share stories about the recording process, and more about the character collaboration in MIRESI. The event will also include a live viewing of the “Jumping in the TIME” music video and an exclusive photo session.

The music video for “Jumping in the TIME” has been released via La+ Darknesss’s YouTube channel. The full audio release is now streaming on major music platforms such as Apple Music, YouTube Music, Spotify.

Built around MIRESI’s core narrative of “journeying with girls across time and space to save Eras on the brink of collapse,” the OST conveys a theme of moving beyond an uncertain future toward hope. The music video visually captures that same spirit.

MIRESI is being developed by Control 9, a studio founded by core developers behind titles such as “Goddess of Victory: Nikke” and “Seven Knights 2.” The game is planned for release in 2026 across various platforms including online PC and mobile platforms. Notably, acclaimed illustrator Hyung-seop “Hyulla” Kim, who previously contributed to numerous subculture games including “Goddess of Victory: Nikke,” is serving as Art Director, drawing further anticipation.

items.title: GHOST X GHOST brings “The T.A.K.O.” with their collection “GHOST ISLAND TRADING”!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
September 25, 2025, Tokyo, Japan – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced a collaboration with GHOST X GHOST on their new collection of apparel, tiki mugs, pool accessories, and other home goods, called – designed to bring the summer vibe year-round.

The collection begins with The (Totally Aquatic Kawaii Object), an inflatable Takodachi float meant for pools and display in collections. The GHOST X GHOST team created the product to make Ina proud by designing something that is both huggable and loungeable. The float features a different expression on each side, and when not in use, folds into a convenient size for easy storage.

The T.A.K.O. is available for preorder at www.GHOSTXGHOST.com until September 26th at NOON PT. In addition to the float, GHOST X GHOST provided an early look at two of its upcoming tiki mug concepts coming soon.

items.title: Release Date Confirmed for the hololive Official Fan Club!
items.author: maki
items.content:
The official fan club for the VTuber group hololive is coming soon!

Tokyo, JAPAN — COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) is pleased to announce the release of the hololive FANCLUB for the COVER VTuber group on October 15, 2025 respectively.

The fan club that many of our incredible fans have been asking for are finally here, complete with a variety of perks that allow fans to feel closer to hololive, including advance tickets for live concerts and events. With the demand for concert tickets on the rise, this will allow fans who regularly support hololive talents to get their hands on tickets earlier.

Fan Club Members-Only Perks

We will continually add new exclusive offers and content available only through the fan club, so be sure to check the official fan club websites and social media accounts for the latest updates and information.

・Fan Club Annual Membership Fees hololive FANCLUB: JPY 6,600 (tax incl.)

・Available Payment Methods

Credit card, convenience store, bank transfer (Pay-easy), Merpay, PayPay

・You will need to register for a hololive account to become a fan club member. ・Membership renewal gifts are yet to be confirmed.

・A separate forwarding service will be used for the overseas shipping of gifts (to anywhere outside of Japan).

・Advance ticketing may not be available for some concerts and events

・A Japanese ticketing agency will be used for advance ticketing for the time being, so we will not be able to accept overseas applications until further notice.

・Annual membership fees may change depending on exchange rates.

・Some countries and regions are not supported.

・Please refer to the membership information released when the services commence for more terms and conditions

・Services provided are subject to change without notice.

About the Existing Fan Club Service

Thank you for your constant support of the hololive Official Fan Club and channels. We will be ending the existing fan club service with the current updates and bonuses in place. The archived website will remain viewable; however, with the new service, all new registrations and membership renewals will automatically be discontinued as of March 31, 2026, at 4:00 PM (JST). The hololive FANCLUB will be on a different website.

End of App Service for the hololive Official Fan Club

Following the discontinuation of the existing hololive Official Fan Club app service, the app will no longer be available after March 31, 2026. After the service ends, the app will no longer be available for download from the App Store and Google Play Store. If you have already downloaded the app, it will no longer be able to be used post this date.

Please refer to the website for more information about the discontinuation of the existing hololive Official Fan Club service.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused to all app users.

items.title: Wei Chuan Dragons × hololive night Brings Record-Breaking Crowds to Taipei Dome
items.author: Horii
items.content:
The special collaboration event “Wei Chuan Dragons × hololive night”, a crossover between professional baseball team of CPBL, Wei Chuan Dragons and hololive production, was held at the Taipei Dome on August 29, 30, and 31, 2025.

From hololive English, Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Gigi Murin, and Raora Panthera were featured throughout the three days, bringing a brand-new experience that blended sports and virtual entertainment!

Fans arriving at the Taipei Dome were welcomed by a full hololive night makeover of the stadium, with banners, pillars, standees, and everywhere decorated in collaboration designs.

Attendees also received exclusive entry gifts: a collaboration postcard on August 29, a transparent bookmark on August 30, and a holographic commemorative ticket on August 31.

Collaboration merchandise was also available in the baseball stadium, including jerseys, acrylic stands, T-shirts, cheering towels, cushions, and a limited-edition iPASS card.

A premium bundle, the “Super Fan Exclusive Set,” was offered as well, featuring “Cheering Happi Coat”, “Special ID Holder”, “Cheering Sticker & Clapper Set”, and “Cheering Towel”.

Merchandise sales attracted long lines before store opening, with the baseball ball selling out almost immediately. According to Wei Chuan Dragons officials, this collaboration event achieved the highest merchandise sales in the past five years.

The atmosphere at the venue was filled with enthusiasm as many fans came in cosplay, wearing hololive happi coats, bringing plushies, and oshi bags.

On August 29, hololive production CEO Motoaki “YAGOO” Tanigo delivered the ceremonial first pitch, caught by CPBL legend Ngayaw Ake’ (Lin Chih-sheng), who is set to retire at the end of the 2025 season. Their appearance became one of the highlights of the event, and the scene has been published on the team’s official YouTube channel together with a pre-game interview. In the interview, Tanigo commented:

“We are delighted to collaborate with the Wei Chuan Dragons, a team with such a storied history. VTubers are virtual entertainers on the internet, but by working together with a team with such a proud tradition, we hope to create brand-new forms of entertainment.”

The video of the interview and the ceremonial first pitch also captured the excitement of the crowd, who cheered enthusiastically as the ceremonial pitch took place.

During the games, hololive talents appeared on the big screens with exclusive video messages, rally announcements, and pre-recorded content including security announcements and cheering songs such as Goal For One, 沒有Dragons就不能活, and Dragon Robe Mission.

On Day 1, following the Wei Chuan Dragons’ victory, the special anthem Red Tide Triumph was also played.

Each day featured a different spotlight talent, as Day 1 with Gigi Murin, Day 2 with Raora Panthera, and Day 3 with FUWAMOCO.

The Wei Chuan Dragons official cheerleaders also performed dance routines to hololive English songs “Born to be “BAU”DOL☆★” and “ABOVE BELOW”.

The players wore the collaboration jerseys during the games, which were broadcast live on television featuring hololive night–themed graphics and visuals.

Each collaboration day closed with the “All For One” light show, which was warmly received by fans and generated positive reactions on social media.

Across three days, the collaboration attracted a total of 95,231 attendees, with the final day reaching a full capacity of 40,000, marking the highest-ever attendance in Taipei Dome history and the largest Sunday crowd of the season.

Thanks to the passion of the fans, “Wei Chuan Dragons × hololive night” became a truly unforgettable event!

items.title: hololive English Official Pop-Up Store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-” To Be Held in New Jersey, USA!
items.author: narita
items.content:
September 12, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced the first of the official hololive English pop up store series, “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-” coming to American Dream Shopping Mall in New Jersey, USA. Doors will open starting October 6th, and will run until November 2nd, 2025.

This pop-up store will feature in-store displays, mystery-solving events, merchandise sales, and meet-and-greet events starring hololive English talents, all of which will center around its “THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-” theme.

Details and additional information regarding this pop up store will be announced at a later date via the official hololive English X account, so please follow us there for the latest updates!

hololive English Official Pop-Up Store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-”

October 6th to November 2nd, 2025 (EDT)*Store hours will be announced at a later date.
